brand.titleLong: WagyuSale — Live Wagyu Cattle & Direct-from-Ranch Wagyu Beef
brand.footerBlurb: the marketplace for live Wagyu cattle & direct Wagyu beef
brand.description: Buy and sell live Wagyu cattle — bulls, cows, bred and open heifers, cow-calf pairs, feeders and steers — and find direct-from-producer Wagyu beef for restaurants, chefs, and home. Search by state or near your ZIP. Free to list.

products.label: Live Cattle
products.blurb: Bulls, cows, bred & open heifers, pairs, feeders and steers — from ranches you can call.

products.label: Wagyu Beef
products.blurb: Quarters, halves, and boxes direct from the producer. Contact the ranch — no middleman.

vocab.help_nuance: WagyuSale is for LIVE Wagyu/Akaushi cattle (bulls, cows, bred and open heifers, cow-calf pairs, feeders and steers) and direct-from-producer beef — the frozen-genetics side (semen, embryos, cloning rights) lives on our sister site WagyuTank.com. Beef sales are discovery-only: WagyuSale connects buyers with producers, and the purchase happens directly with the ranch (no on-platform beef payments). 'Fullblood' means 100% Japanese pedigree; 'purebred'/'F1–F4' are percentage crosses — sellers should state the percentage.

copy.heroTitle: The marketplace for live Wagyu cattle & direct Wagyu beef
copy.heroSub: Buy and sell live Wagyu — bulls, bred heifers, cow-calf pairs, feeders and steers — and find direct-from-ranch Wagyu beef near you. Search by state or ZIP. List in under a minute. Free.
copy.searchPlaceholder: Search cattle, a ranch, or a state…
copy.roundupTitle: Every Wagyu cattle & beef listing, one feed
copy.roundupIntro: The Roundup brings the whole live-Wagyu market together: listings posted on WagyuSale plus cattle-for-sale and beef listings we track from ranchers' public pages across the web (marked 📡 — those link straight back to the original seller's page; web sellers pay nothing and can remove a listing anytime).
copy.theaterIntro: Wagyu cattle on film — sale-day footage, ranch tours, and buyer how-to. Searchable by registration number.
copy.beefIntro: Direct from the ranch to your kitchen or restaurant. Browse Wagyu beef producers by state, buy straight from the source, and taste single-origin, fully-traceable Wagyu — no middleman.

substitutions: Frozen genetics stay in the facility's tank until you arrange shipping.
Contact the seller to arrange viewing, transport, or delivery.
